summary: Frontend-only verification of Parent Dashboard 'Link Child' nudge fix (defer nudge behind welcome tour via user.has_completed_onboarding). All 4 review bullets PASS.

issues: Radix accessibility warnings: DialogContent missing DialogTitle/aria-describedby (non-blocking a11y warning)

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding DialogTitle (or VisuallyHidden wrapper) to Link a Child and any other DialogContent to fix Radix a11y warnings.
test_credentials: nudge_parent@test.com / testpass123 (no children, onboarding done); wallet_demo_parent@test.com / testpass123 (has Demo Kid)
context_for_next_testing_agent: TEST 1 (nudge_parent): parent-dashboard renders, 'Welcome to CoinQuest' text NOT present, 0 open dialogs, link-child-nudge visible with text 'Step 1: Link your child...', parent-link-child-btn has 'nudge-highlight' class. TEST 2: clicking Link Child opens 'Link a Child' dialog and link-child-nudge is absent. TEST 3 (wallet_demo_parent): link-child-nudge absent, button class does NOT contain 'nudge-highlight'. Note: welcome tour DOES appear for wallet_demo_parent (their has_completed_onboarding is false) — expected, not a regression, and the nudge correctly stays hidden regardless. No page console errors on parent-dashboard (only Radix a11y warnings).
rca of the issue: Fix in ParentDashboard.jsx (nudge conditional gated on user?.has_completed_onboarding) works as intended. Verified nudge_parent's has_completed_onboarding=true suppresses the welcome tour and shows the nudge without overlap.
